metadata.title: Use Cases
metadata.description: See how Play Harmonium fits practice sessions, lessons, and quick idea capture.

showcases.title: Practice flows Play Harmonium is built for
showcases.description: A light tool can still serve serious daily use when the workflow is clear.

items.title: Daily Riyaz
items.description: Open the keyboard, set the octave, and begin a short daily practice session in seconds.

items.title: Lesson Support
items.description: Teachers can demonstrate note relationships and transpose quickly during class.

items.title: Quick Vocal Warm-up
items.description: Use a browser tab instead of setting up a larger instrument for short warm-up drills.
